Check the root README first so the request stays close to the repo's local contract-testing story.

## Requested Example

Describe the workflow example you want to see.

## Why It Matters

Explain why this example would be useful to downstream adopters.

## Desired Contract Shape

Describe the stable output contract you would expect.

## Integration Seam

Describe where a real client would plug in and what should stay mockable.

## Failure Modes To Cover

List the malformed-output, missing-fields, retry, or fallback cases that should be demonstrated.
